title: Topography of Terror Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Topography of Terror Berlin is free** and normally open daily from **10:00 to 20:00**.
It stands on the former grounds of the Gestapo, SS leadership and Reich Security Main Office, so the location is part of the story.
**Plan 75 to 120 minutes** for a first visit. The main permanent exhibition alone is roughly a 60-minute frame.
Use the free audio guide or a slow self-guided route; do not treat it as a quick rainy-day filler.
Pair it with Checkpoint Charlie or the Holocaust Memorial only if you have mental room. Do not stack it after Sachsenhausen on the same day.
